target: 54. Something Horrifying
Hizuru Minakata
I've lost sight of Mio-san... I wonder if she's safe?
This might not be the time to worry about others... Look at this... What the hell is this place...!?
Those are deep-sea anemones. It's impossible for them to be alive on land.
If it is possible, then they're all Shadows too...!
…Wait… Hiruko-sama came from the sea… Could it be… the Shadows are—
…Ngh!!
…I don't like this at all…
Twice!! You delivered the finishing blow to him… Why is he!! Is he immortal!?
…Huh? Aren't you surprised?
Assuming you weren't dead, everything makes sense.
You faked being beaten by me, and slipped underground through the cracks in the ground… Am I wrong?
My sister was suspicious of the sewers.
…Heh… As expected of Hizuru…
Why did you come back to interfere? I told you I'd kill you next time we met, didn't I…?
I guess telling you wouldn't mean anything. Ryunosuke Minakata…
Hey!! Did you tell him your name!?
No!
To think you were inside Hizuru...
No way… Don't tell me you're…
Are you… Haine?
A reunion after 14 years, is it...?
…But I have no business with you. A Ryunosuke made only of personality and memories.
Where did the "body" go?
Where's the body that stole Mother's right eye?
Haine… So it was you from the start… Are you playing make-believe again?
This time, using Shiori Kobayakawa's memories...!!
(My shotgun blast was blocked!? With a scanned manhole cover!?)
(No, more importantly... The shot that should have hit was blocked...!!)
I read their memories... Neither Hizuru nor Ryunosuke know where the body went. I can't read the old man's... "Immunity," huh.
May I kill them?
Fine by me.
We're running, Ryunosuke... They're impossible to beat.
You're joking, right?

Don't you get it?!
We're the ones being hunted!!
They aren't human Shadows...!! They're something more horrifying... something else entirely!!
…Cough.
Be careful, okay? Ryunosuke is shifted.
He's shifted about two seconds... into the future.
Yes, I know.
Ryunosuke!!!
Guh!!
Alright, one down.
(Nezu-san... protected me and got shot...!!)
(Even though I could see the future where he shot...!! Damn it!! Damn it!!!)
Number two...
Ngh!!
Oh... you dodged it.
Nezu-san...!!
Ngh...!
You piece of shiiiiiiit!!!
(Every shot... blocked!!)
Hmm... Around here?
(Read the trajectory... Escape from—)
This is tricky... predicting ahead to land a hit.
(That's... a handgun...!! He copied something besides the shotgun...!)
(This is bad... I have to get away, even if I have to force it...!!)
You're not going after him?
There's no need... Look at the ground.
The blood is dark... I shot through the liver. It's a fatal wound... He'll die soon enough even if left alone.
What about Ushio and Shinpei-kun?
They're already close, but don't worry. I've attached two Strays to Tokiko.
More importantly, I'm starving... I wish it would be 9 o'clock already.
